title: Renewals in Practice
shortSummary: Build stronger renewals in practice judgment so customer success work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Renewals in Practice is a leverage point inside customer success. It supports the broader goal of retention, onboarding, support, and churn prevention.
coreConcepts: Renewals in Practice needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good renewals in practice work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Renewals in Practice should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
